info.name: FedProspector API
info.description: Federal contract prospecting system API â€” search opportunities, manage prospects, track proposals

item.name: Auth
Authenticate a user and return a JWT token.
Revoke the current session token (log out).
Register a new user account and return a JWT token.
Change the current user's password. Revokes all active sessions.
Get the current user's profile.
Update the current user's profile (display name and/or email).
Admin
Get ETL pipeline status, API usage, and recent errors. Admin only.
List all users. Admin only.
Update a user's role, admin status, or active status. Admin only.
Force-reset a user's password and revoke all sessions. Admin only.
Opportunities
GET /api/v1/opportunities
GET /api/v1/opportunities/targets
GET /api/v1/opportunities/{noticeId}
Awards
GET /api/v1/awards
GET /api/v1/awards/{contractId}/burn-rate
GET /api/v1/awards/{contractId}
Entities
GET /api/v1/entities
GET /api/v1/entities/{uei}/competitor-profile
GET /api/v1/entities/{uei}/exclusion-check
GET /api/v1/entities/{uei}
Subawards
Search for teaming partners based on subaward history.
Dashboard
Get the prospect pipeline dashboard with status counts, due items, and workload.
Prospects
Create a new prospect from an opportunity.
Search prospects with filters and pagination.
Get full prospect detail including opportunity, notes, team, proposal, and score.
Update a prospect's status following the defined status flow.
Reassign a prospect to a different user.
Add a note to a prospect.
Add a team member to a prospect.
Remove a team member from a prospect.
Recalculate the Go/No-Go score for a prospect.
Proposals
Create a new proposal linked to a prospect.
Update a proposal (status, estimated value, win probability).
Add a document record to a proposal.
List milestones for a proposal.
Update a milestone within a proposal.
SavedSearches
List all active saved searches for the current user.
Create a new saved search.
Execute a saved search and return matching opportunities.
Soft-delete a saved search (sets IsActive to N).
Notifications
List notifications for the current user with optional filters.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for the current user.
Health
GET /health
